title: SQL Mission 6: Latest 3 Orders Per Customer

initialState.content:
-- Mission 6 Guidelines
-- Rank rows per customer by order_date desc
-- Keep ranks <= 3

WITH ranked_orders AS (
  SELECT
    customer_id,
    order_id,
    order_date,
    -- TODO row_number
  FROM orders
)
SELECT
  customer_id,
  order_id,
  order_date
FROM ranked_orders
WHERE
  -- TODO
ORDER BY customer_id, order_date DESC;

rules: must_include:row_number() over (partition by customer_id order by order_date desc) as rn
